title: Battle of Coruscant (disambiguation)
content:
As the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] was a prime military target for millennia. There have been many '''battles of Coruscant''' throughout [[Timeline of galactic history/Legends|galactic history]], including the following:

==Canon==
===Sith war===
*'''[[Battle of Coruscant (Sith war)|Battle of Coruscant]]''' during the [[Sith war (Old Republic)|Sith war]].

===Mandalorian-Jedi conflict===
*'''[[Sacking of the Jedi Temple]]''' during the [[Mandalorian-Jedi War]].

===Jedi-Sith War===
*'''[[Battle of Coruscant (Jedi-Sith War)|Battle of Coruscant]]''', an earlier battle during the [[Jedi-Sith War]].
*'''[[Liberation of Coruscant]]''', the final battle of the Jedi-Sith War.

===Clone Wars===
*'''[[Battle of Coruscant]]''', one of the defining battles during the [[Clone Wars]].
*'''[[Operation: Knightfall]]'''

===Galactic Civil War===
*'''[[Arrth-Eno Mission]]''' on [[Coruscant]] in [[0 ABY]].
*'''[[Riot in Monument Plaza]]''' on Coruscant during the [[Galactic Civil War]].
*'''[[Coruscant civil war]]''', a civil war that broke out on Coruscant during the Galactic Civil War.
*'''[[Attack on Coruscant's Verity District]]''', an attack on the [[Hall of Imperial Register]] by [[Soran Keize]].

===Uprising against the First Order===
*'''[[Uprising on Coruscant]]''' during the [[uprising against the First Order]].

==Legends==
===Zhell-Taung war===
*The '''[[Zhell–Taung war|war]]''' between the [[Zhell/Legends|Zhell]] and [[Taung/Legends|Taung]], which included a '''[[Destruction of Zhell|battle]]''' at the city of [[Great Zhell]].

===First Great Schism===
*A '''[[Battle of Coruscant (First Great Schism)|battle]]''' during the [[First Great Schism]].

===Tionese War===
*A '''[[Battle of Coruscant (Tionese War)|battle]]''' during the [[Tionese War]].

===Duinuogwuin Contention===
*An '''[[attack on Coruscant]]''' during the [[Duinuogwuin Contention]]

===Great Hyperspace War===
*A '''[[Battle of Coruscant (Great Hyperspace War)|battle]]''' during the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]]

===Great Droid Revolution===
*The '''[[Great Droid Revolution]]'''

===Great Sith War===
*The '''[[Battle of Coruscant (Great Sith War)|Battle of Coruscant]]''' during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]].

===Vindication===
*'''[[Vindication]]'''

===Great Galactic War===
*The '''[[Sacking of Coruscant]]''' during the [[Great Galactic War]].

===War against Zakuul===
*A '''[[bombardment of Coruscant]]''' during the [[war against Zakuul]].

===Uprisings against the Eternal Alliance===
*A '''[[battle in the Works]]''' during the [[Uprisings against the Eternal Alliance]].

===Seventeeth Alsakan conflict===
*An '''[[Corellian privateer attack on Coruscant|attack]]''' during the [[Seventeenth Alsakan Conflict]].

===Pre-Clone Wars===
*An '''[[Attack on Coruscant (pre–Clone Wars)|attack]]''' over 1000 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

===Clone Wars===
*The '''[[Coruscant Insurrection]]''' during the Clone Wars
*The '''[[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]]''' during the Clone Wars.
*'''[[Operation: Knightfall/Legends|Operation: Knightfall]]'''

===Imperial Period===
*A [[Military revolt on Coruscant|military revolt]] and [[Battle on Coruscant|battle]] during the [[Ghost Prison incident]].

===Galactic Civil War===
*A '''[[raid above Coruscant]]'''
*The '''[[Battle over Coruscant]]'''
*[[Battle of Imperial Center|Two]] [[Second battle of Imperial Center|battles]] during the [[Zaarin insurrection]].
*An '''[[Coruscant uprising|uprising]]''' on Coruscant in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]
*The '''[[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|Liberation of Coruscant]]'''
*A '''[[Raid on Coruscant (Thrawn Crisis)|raid]]''' on Coruscant in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]
*The '''[[Siege of Coruscant]]'''
*The '''[[Second Battle of Coruscant]]'''

===Yuuzhan Vong War===
*The '''[[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]]''' during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].
*The '''[[Battle of the World-Well]]'''
*The '''[[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]]'''

===Lost Tribe of the Sith Emergence===
*The '''[[Liberation of Coruscant (Lost Tribe of Sith emergence)|Liberation of Coruscant]]''' during the [[Lost Tribe of Sith emergence]]

===Sith–Imperial War===
*A '''[[Battle of Coruscant (Sith–Imperial War)|battle]]''' during the [[Sith–Imperial War]]

===Second Imperial Civil War===
*A '''[[Battle of Coruscant (Second Imperial Civil War)|battle]]''' during the [[Second Imperial Civil War]].

==See also==
:*[[Mission to Coruscant (disambiguation)|Mission to Coruscant]]
